backstory.original: Spurt the Kobold Inventor is crafty and quick with his hands. He builds improvised weapons in the hope of gaining some new advantage in combat. Spurt never knew he would have such lasting appeal when he met a mighty group of adventurers in a cave, but here we are. Packed to the gills with his 'awesome' inventions this clever kobold brings his 11-days of life experiences to the Champions, along with a really cool 'Centi-pult'!
backstory.display: 狗头人发明家斯普特是个狡猾的家伙。他双手灵巧，会打造一些简易武器，以期在战斗中不断获得优势。当斯普特在一个山洞里遇到一群强大的冒险家时，他还不知道自己会有如此强大的魅力。但现在，这个聪明的狗头人带着他“伟大”的发明，把他 11 天的生活经验，连同他那个非常酷的蜈蚣弹弓一起带给了勇士们。

description.original: Spurt tosses a wasp nest at a random enemy, dealing damage.
description.display: 斯普特向一名随机敌人投掷黄蜂巢，造成伤害。

description.original: Spurt tosses a wasp nest at a stalking giant, and then is immediately killed.
description.display: 斯普特向一名尾随的巨人投掷黄蜂巢，然后瞬间被杀死。

longDescription.original: Spurt tosses a wasp nest at a stalking giant, and then is immediately killed by a giant hammer, which damages all Enemies on screen. Spurt then comes back as a spirit, increasing the effects of his abilities until he revives.
longDescription.display: 斯普特向一名尾随的巨人投掷黄蜂巢，然后瞬间被巨型战锤杀死，同时对屏幕上的所有敌人造成伤害。斯普特随后会以灵魂状态存在，在复活前提升其技能效果。

description.desc: Unlocks Spurt's ultimate attack: You Dead! When Spurt uses his ultimate he becomes Spurt's Spirit until his ultimate is 10s from cooling down. While he's a Spirit, he increases the party's damage and buffs his other formation abilities in unique ways.
解锁斯普特的杀招攻击：你死了！当斯普特使用杀招时，他会变成斯普特的魂灵，直到他的杀招剩余 10 秒进入冷却。处于魂灵形态时，他会提高探险队的伤害，并以独特的方式强化他的其他阵型技能。

tipText.original: Spurt's ultimate causes him to temporarily sacrifice himself, increasing the effects of his other abilities.
tipText.display: 斯普特的杀招使他暂时献祭自己，以强化其他技能的效果。

conditions.desc: Spurt increases the damage of Champions two slots away by $amount%
Spurt increases the damage of adjacent Champions by $amount%
^^({Spirit:}#99C7F7 This effect is increased by 2% for each second of Spurt's maximum Ultimate cooldown, stacking multiplicatively)
斯普特使距离他两个栏位的勇士伤害提高 $amount%
斯普特使与他相邻的勇士伤害提高 $amount%
^^（{魂灵:}#99C7F7 斯普特的最大杀招冷却时间每秒均使此效果提高 2%，以乘算方式堆叠）

description.pre: Spurt gains a stack of Wa-spiration every time he attacks. Every $(stacks_until_effect) Wa-spiration stacks, Spurt invents a random effect. Effects can stack up to $(max_effect_stacks) times each and persist until the area changes.

conditions.desc: ^^({Spirit:}#99C7F7 Wa-spiration stacks are gained when an adjacent Champion attacks and the base multipliers of the invented effects are increased by 100%)

description.pre: 斯普特每次攻击都会获得一层黄蜂启迪。每 $(stacks_until_effect) 层黄蜂启迪均使斯普特发明一个随机效果。每个效果可以堆叠 $(max_effect_stacks) 层，并持续到改变区域。

conditions.desc: ^^（{魂灵:}#99C7F7 相邻勇士发动攻击可使其获得“黄蜂启迪”堆叠层数，并且发明效果的基础乘数提高 100%）

tipText.original: Spurt's attacks grant him the inspiration he needs to create new and interesting buffs for the party.
tipText.display: 斯普特的攻击赋予他所需的灵感，从而为队伍创造有趣的新增益。

conditions.desc: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for every Kobold and Unaffiliated Non-Kobold in the formation, including Spurt.
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(not_buffed amount)% for every Kobold in the formation, including Spurt.
阵型中每有一名狗头人（包括斯普特）以及无从属组织的非狗头人勇士均使所有勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%。
阵型中每有一名狗头人（包括斯普特）即提升所有勇士 $(not_buffed amount)% 伤害。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Pack Tactics by $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Spurt loves his kobold brothers and sisters. Even the tall, old, non-koboldy ones.
specializationDescription.display: 斯普特热爱他的狗头人兄弟姐妹。包括高大的、年老的，或者不是狗头人的那些。

description.desc: Centipede Net instead affects champions who are 2 formation slots away from Spurt and its effect is increased by $amount%
蜈蚣之网改为影响距离斯普特 2 个阵型栏位的勇士，并且效果提高 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Spurt tosses helpful centipedes to Champions even further away.
specializationDescription.display: 斯普特将有益蜈蚣扔向距离更远的勇士。

description.desc: Unaffiliated Non-Kobold Champions count as Kobolds for the purposes of Pack Tactics

data.stack_title: Kobolds and Unaffiliated Non-Kobolds in the formation

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

description.desc: 无从属组织的非狗头人勇士也被“集群战术”算作狗头人

data.stack_title: 阵型中的狗头人与无从属组织的非狗头人

effect_keys.dev_note: this effect key is just for getting the number of champions targetted in the formation for the spec option post apply info

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 无从属组织的非狗头人勇士：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Spurt adopts Unaffiliated Non-Kobold Champions into his family.
specializationDescription.display: 斯普特收养无从属组织的非狗头人勇士，将其纳入自己的家族。

description.original: I kill giants! Don't you worry!
I help the group, even after I splatted.
description.display: 哪怕我挂了，也还是能帮到团队。

description.original: Has anyone seen my brother? I mean, my slime?
description.display: 有人看到我弟弟吗？我是说，我的软泥怪。

description.original: What you call pack of Kobolds? Pack of Kobolds, duh.
description.display: 一群狗头人叫什么？狗头人群，哈。

description.original: I'm the most durable kobold of all kobolds!
description.display: 我是耐力最好的狗头人！

description.original: You get a wasp. And YOU get a wasp!
description.display: 你得到一只黄蜂。然后你又得到了一只黄蜂！

description.original: I'll rub some dirt on it. Keep going, most important.
description.display: 我会在上面擦一些泥土。继续前进，最重要。

description.original: I call this bag the angries.
I made a discovery! Wyvern tail VERY stingy!
description.display: 我发现了一点！双足飞龙的尾巴有非常多的刺！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Spurt's Wa-spiration: Stingy ability by $amount%

description.original: Agent Spurt, ready! Let's have some FUN! Together, WE WIN!
description.display: 特工斯普特，准备就绪！我们来找点乐子吧！齐心协力，我们必胜！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each Unaffiliated Champion in the formation

description.original: I want to be friends with everyone! EVERYONE!
description.display: 我想和所有人交朋友！所有人！

effects.description: Spurt always counts as Undead, even when not in Spirit form.

adventures.name: Wasps and the Kobold that Loves Them

character_sheet_details.backstory: Spurt the Kobold Inventor is crafty and quick with his hands. He builds improvised weapons in the hope of gaining some new advantage in combat. Spurt never knew he would have such lasting appeal when he met a mighty group of adventurers in a cave, but here we are. Packed to the gills with his 'awesome' inventions this clever kobold brings his 11-days of life experiences to the Champions, along with a really cool 'Centi-pult'!
character_sheet_details.system_description: Spurt is a dedicated and inventive support Champion. Unfortunately, he dies quite often, but luckily it buffs all of his abilities whenever he does.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 狗头人发明家斯普特是个狡猾的家伙。他双手灵巧，会打造一些简易武器，以期在战斗中不断获得优势。当斯普特在一个山洞里遇到一群强大的冒险家时，他还不知道自己会有如此强大的魅力。但现在，这个聪明的狗头人带着他“伟大”的发明，把他 11 天的生活经验，连同他那个非常酷的蜈蚣弹弓一起带给了勇士们。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 斯普特是个专注而富有创造力的辅助型勇士。不幸的是他经常会死掉，但幸运的是每当他死亡时，他的所有技能都会得到加强。
